steps.goal: Decompose the overall task of creating an operator-style note into individual writing steps, each addressing one of the provided facts.
steps.title: Decompose the task

steps.goal: Draft the first part of the operator-style note, focusing on the fact that Open-Eywa treats the node as the durable unit of work.
steps.title: Draft note part 1

steps.goal: Draft the second part of the operator-style note, focusing on the fact that mission runs are stored in mission folders.
steps.title: Draft note part 2

steps.goal: Draft the third part of the operator-style note, focusing on the fact that testing improves reliability.
steps.title: Draft note part 3

steps.goal: Synthesize the three drafted parts into a cohesive, short, operator-style note.
steps.title: Synthesize final note

steps.goal: Write the synthesized operator-style note to `output/note.md`.
steps.title: Write final note
